creator: dclarke@blastwave.org
text:
europa#	uname -apKU
FreeBSD europa 13.0-RELEASE-p7 FreeBSD 13.0-RELEASE-p7 #0: Mon Jan 31 18:24:03 UTC 2022     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/GENERIC  amd64 amd64 1300139 1300139
europa#	

europa#	gdb -q pkg
Reading symbols from pkg...
(No debugging symbols found in pkg)
(gdb) run upgrade -Ffy
Starting program: /usr/sbin/pkg upgrade -Ffy
process 1182 is executing new program: /usr/local/sbin/pkg
Updating FreeBSD repository catalogue...
FreeBSD repository is up to date.
All repositories are up to date.
Checking for upgrades (395 candidates):  40%

Program received signal SIGSEGV, Segmentation fault.
Address not mapped to object.
0x0000000800cfc25f in strlen () from /lib/libc.so.7
(gdb) where
#0  0x0000000800cfc25f in strlen () from /lib/libc.so.7
#1  0x0000000000484de5 in pkg_jobs_universe_find ()
#2  0x00000000004960be in pkg_jobs_try_remote_candidate ()
#3  0x0000000000495cf9 in pkg_jobs_find_upgrade ()
#4  0x0000000000492f14 in pkg_jobs_solve ()
#5  0x00000000002b245e in exec_upgrade ()
#6  0x00000000002ab986 in main ()
(gdb) quit 
A debugging session is active.

	Inferior 1 [process 1182] will be killed.

Quit anyway? (y or n) y
europa#	

This is repeatable and I have seen it four times today regardless 
of gdb or not and I have core files.
